sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n24260" key="deutero/prwton" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δευτερό-πρωτον</orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">σάββατον, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>,</foreign> prob. corrupt in <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0031.tlg003.perseus-grc1:6:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Ev.Luc.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.1</biblScope> </bibl> (no expl. is satisfactory).</entryFree>
